testcase.name: contextLoads

(set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists activities cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists alerts cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists comments cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists events cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists files cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists login_logs cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists milestones cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists notifications cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists project_members cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists projects cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists roles cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists system_config cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists task_dependencies cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists tasks cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists token_blacklists cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists user_bindings cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists user_roles cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists work_hours cascade Hibernate: create table activities ( created_at timestamp(6), entity_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, project_id bigint, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, action varchar(255) not null, entity_type varchar(255) not null, metadata TEXT, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table alerts ( resolved boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, target_id bigint, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint, message TEXT not null, metadata TEXT, severity varchar(255) not null check (severity in ('LOW','MEDIUM','HIGH','CRITICAL')), target_type varchar(255), type varchar(255) not null check (type in ('LOGIN_FAILURE','SUSPICIOUS_ACTIVITY','PERMISSION_DENIED')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table comments ( created_at timestamp(6), entity_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, parent_id bigint, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, content TEXT not null, entity_type varchar(255) not null, mentions VARCHAR(500), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table events ( all_day boolean, reminder_minutes integer, created_at timestamp(6), end_time timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, project_id bigint, start_time timestamp(6) not null, task_id bigint, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, description TEXT, location varchar(255), repeat_rule varchar(255), title varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table files ( created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, project_id bigint, size bigint not null, task_id bigint, updated_at timestamp(6), uploaded_by bigint not null, entity varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255) not null, path varchar(255) not null, type varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table login_logs ( success boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, device varchar(255), ip varchar(255), platform varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table milestones ( due_date date not null, order_index integer, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, project_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6), description TEXT, name varchar(255) not null, status varchar(255) check (status in ('PENDING','COMPLETED')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table notifications ( is_read boolean, created_at timestamp(6), entity_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null, content TEXT not null, entity_type varchar(255), title varchar(255) not null, type varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table project_members ( created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, joined_at timestamp(6), project_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, role varchar(255) check (role in ('OWNER','ADMIN','MEMBER','VIEWER')), primary key (id), unique (project_id, user_id) ) Hibernate: create table projects ( budget numeric(15,2), end_date date, start_date date, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, owner_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6), code varchar(255) not null unique, description TEXT, name varchar(255) not null, priority varchar(255) check (priority in ('HIGH','MEDIUM','LOW')), remarks TEXT, status varchar(255) check (status in ('ACTIVE','ARCHIVED','DELETED')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table roles ( created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), description TEXT, name varchar(255) not null unique, permissions TEXT not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table system_config ( id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), config_key varchar(100) not null unique, config_value TEXT, description varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table task_dependencies ( created_at timestamp(6), depend_task_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, task_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table tasks ( due_date date, priority integer, sort_order integer, start_date date, assigned_to bigint, created_at timestamp(6), created_by bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, parent_id bigint, project_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6), attachments TEXT, description TEXT, status varchar(255) check (status in ('TODO','DOING','DONE','ARCHIVED')), tags VARCHAR(500), title varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table token_blacklists ( created_at timestamp(6), expire_time timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, token varchar(2048) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table user_bindings ( created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, avatar varchar(255), nickname varchar(255), open_id varchar(255) not null, platform varchar(255) not null check (platform in ('WECHAT','DINGTALK')), union_id varchar(255), primary key (id), unique (platform, open_id) ) Hibernate: create table user_roles ( created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, project_id bigint, role_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table users ( is_admin boolean, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), avatar varchar(255), email varchar(255) unique, name varchar(255) not null, password varchar(255), phone varchar(255), status varchar(255) check (status in ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE','DELETED')), username varchar(255) unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table work_hours ( date date not null, hours numeric(5,2) not null, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, project_id bigint, task_id bigint, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, description TEXT, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create index idx_activity_project on activities (project_id) Hibernate: create index idx_activity_user on activities (user_id) Hibernate: create index idx_activity_created on activities (created_at) Hibernate: create index idx_alert_type_created on alerts (type, created_at) Hibernate: create index idx_alert_resolved_created on alerts (resolved, created_at) Hibernate: create index idx_comment_entity on comments (entity_type, entity_id) Hibernate: create index idx_event_user_time on events (user_id, start_time) Hibernate: create index idx_file_task on files (task_id) Hibernate: create index idx_file_project on files (project_id) Hibernate: create index idx_loginlog_user on login_logs (user_id) Hibernate: create index idx_loginlog_created on login_logs (created_at) Hibernate: create index idx_notif_user on notifications (user_id) Hibernate: create index idx_notif_read on notifications (user_id, is_read) Hibernate: create index idx_notif_created on notifications (created_at) Hibernate: create index idx_dep_task on task_dependencies (task_id) Hibernate: create index idx_dep_depend on task_dependencies (depend_task_id) Hibernate: create index idx_task_project on tasks (project_id) Hibernate: create index idx_task_assignee on tasks (assigned_to) Hibernate: create index idx_task_status on tasks (status) Hibernate: create index idx_task_due_date on tasks (due_date) Hibernate: create index idx_task_parent on tasks (parent_id) Hibernate: create index idx_task_sort on tasks (sort_order) Hibernate: create index idx_token_expire on token_blacklists (expire_time) Hibernate: create index idx_token_user on token_blacklists (user_id) Hibernate: create index idx_workhour_user_date on work_hours (user_id, date) Hibernate: create index idx_workhour_project on work_hours (project_id) Hibernate: alter table if exists activities add constraint
